data.content:
Implementation plan for Search view entry on Enter:

1. Introduce a first-class `search` beats view in the shared URL/view parsing used by the header and `/beats` page. Treat `view=search` as a list-capable view so the page fetches beat data when `q` is present, while preserving existing queues/active/finalcut/retakes/history behavior.

2. Update `src/components/search-bar.tsx` so submit semantics are explicit: pressing Enter with a non-empty query should navigate to `/beats?view=search&q=...` and preserve unrelated URL state that should survive search (`repo`, filters, page size, detail params if still valid). Clearing search should remove `q` and, if currently on `view=search`, fall back to the default non-search list view instead of leaving the user in an empty special state.

3. Update `src/components/app-header.tsx` to recognize `search` in `beatsView`, keep global header controls stable on that screen, and decide whether the Search screen appears as its own highlighted tab/chip or as a neutral state outside the existing tab strip. The minimal path is no new tab button but correct parsing and button visibility; if product wants a visible Search tab, add it consistently there.

4. Update `src/app/beats/page.tsx` to render search results through the existing table/lightbox path. Define `isListView` to include `search`, choose how `viewPhase` defaults when search is active (likely reuse queue filters rather than invent new search-only filters), and ensure detail/lightbox behavior remains valid while browsing results.

5. Add focused regression tests. At minimum: source/layout tests for header/page recognition of `view=search`; behavioral tests for SearchBar submit/clear URL generation; and a page-level test that search mode is treated as a list/data-fetching view. If no component interaction test harness exists yet, add the smallest new test surface necessary rather than broad end-to-end coverage.

Files likely touched:
- src/components/search-bar.tsx
- src/components/app-header.tsx
- src/app/beats/page.tsx
- src/lib/__tests__/beats-page-layout.test.ts
- new/updated tests around SearchBar or page URL handling

Complexity: low to medium.
Risks:
- accidental leakage of queue/active default state rules into search mode
- unclear UX for what happens when clearing `q` from `view=search`
- preserving/stripping detail params incorrectly when switching from non-list screens

No child knots appear necessary for this scope.
